title: agreement missing response
description: Schema of json object returned as response when agreement is missing.

example.error_msg: Der Datenschutzerklärung wurde noch nicht zugestimmt.

error.description: Indicates the type of error that occurred.

error_msg.description: A human-readable message describing the error.

agreement_url.description: The URL to call to agree to the terms.

agree_param.description: The query parameter for agreeing to the terms.

agreement_html.description: The html content of the agreement that is missing.
